issue_title: fix(toolbar): make arrow and shape picker button automatically select the first arrow/shape if it's the first time
issue_body_preview:
This PR mainly fix the issue #330.
So everytime entering the website, the arrow and shape picker will automatically choose the first shape/arrow in order to prevent that the picker button will not automatically be able to draw the first arrow/shape.
test_description_zh: 首次进入网站后，点击工具栏中的箭头（Arrow）选择器按钮或形状（Shape）选择器按钮，不展开下拉选择列表，直接在画布上尝试绘制。
expected_result_zh: 首次点击箭头或形状选择器按钮时，应自动选中第一个箭头/形状选项，用户无需手动展开选择器即可直接在画布上绘制出对应的第一个箭头或形状。
